name: sync includes the three operator-editable url registries STANDARDS PR-SOURCES and COMPLIANCE
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/sync/list-contents.sh" 2>out.txt && grep -q 'STANDARDS-URLS.yaml' out.txt && grep -q 'PR-SOURCES.yaml' out.txt && grep -q 'COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
